历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 9989 → 13487 → 34240 → 20901 → 22911. In 2023, there was an abnormal drop to 34240, followed by a recovery to 20901 in 2024, and a slight shift to 22911 in 2025. In recent two years, it has stabilized in the range of 21,000–23,000. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 22911. The provincial science/physics enrollment plan was 37 in 2021, 38 in 2022, 36 in 2023, 38 in 2024, and 39 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 36, a reduction of 3 (-7.7%) compared to 2025, intensifying competition and causing the ranking number to decrease.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked 82nd in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, stable in the 82–84 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level nationwide. The 2025 reputation evaluation is generally positive (Journalism and Communication A++ discipline ranking). The 2026 reputation is slightly negative (dormitory fire incidents), but overall positive. Douyin heat ranking is 11th (high heat), with a comprehensive heat of 4.31 million, reflecting high attention on short video platforms, which may increase application heat. Journalism and Communication is A+ (top nationwide), directly corresponding to the university's advertising, communication, and other enrollment majors, strongly attracting candidates in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic information/communication majors were highly recommended in 2024, computer majors recommended (67.8), matching Communication University of China's communication engineering, computer science, and other majors. Journalism and Communication was clearly discouraged in 2023, but as a top institution in the media field, it has brand premium. The total number of regular college entrance exam takers in the province for 2026 is 451,000, slightly down from 2025 (history + physics ≈ 462,179), but the proportion of physics category is expected to continue rising, intensifying overall competition. Communication University of China is located in Beijing, which has regional appeal for Anhui candidates. The university's enrollment scale in Anhui is moderate (about 36–39 people), belonging to cross-provincial medium-scale enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 22911, the 2026 enrollment reduction of 3 (-7.7%) intensifying competition, positive school reputation and high Douyin heat, rising popularity of electronic information/communication majors, and the expanding scale of physics category candidates in the province; after considering these factors, competition is expected to further intensify, with a predicted minimum ranking of approximately 21654, in the range of 21154–22154.
